description: Composition Blue mix-and-match printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has an elasticated boat neck, short raglan and puffed sleeves with elasticated cuffs, gathered from the neck to the waist, sash with loops and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the mix-and-match print adds zing to the garment. Team it with leggings or pyjamas, chunky accessories and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
